Adopting special silicone ingredient, DE-RUST & LUBRICANT can foam a protective film on the metallic surface so as to prevent the surface from contacting with moisture and air, thus avoid the surface from oxidizing and rusting. It is widely applied in the protection of precision components, electric fitting contacts, iron and steel parts as well as supersensitive components. With high permeating ability, it is commonly used in the maintenance of machines, armament, electric tools and precision instruments. It can stop squeaking of chairs, door hinges, metal gate and vehicle parts, at mean time, eliminating moistures so as to prevent the surface from corroding and making sure of its good lubricating performance.

DIRECTION:

  1. SPRAY PAINTING: Brush painting and dipping are acceptable for the using of this product.
  2. SLIGHT RUST: Spray it on the metal surface and then brush it, clean it with clean water about 10-15 minutes.
  3. MODERATE RUST: Spray it on the metal surface, prolong the time that the liquid stay on the metal surface, then wiping or de-rusting it again are also acceptable, it would be better if cleaned with clean water.
  4. SERIOUS RUST: Dipping in the de-rust lubricating till the layer of rust is cleared away. Better effect will be obtained if the gusher of de-rust lubricating is heated up to 150℉.

FEATURE: Flamingo Leather Polish is specially formulated to not only clean surface grime, but to also reach into the leather grain to remove dirt. In addition to just cleaning, this product also conditions your leather to restore its supple feel and natural beauty. Restores leather to a \"like-new\" appearance.

USAGE DIRECTION:

For best results: First test an inconspicuous area before use. Not for use on suede or unfinished leather.

  1. Shake well
  2. Apply liberally to a clean cloth or spray directly onto leather surface
  3. Wipe evenly over surface and remove excess
  4. Apply as often as needed to clean, condition, and protect your leather

CAUTION:

  • Place it at cool and dry conditions, do not expose to heat or store at temperatures above 120℉.
  • Keep away from flame and avoid direct sunlight.
  • Avoid contact with eyes. In case of eye contact or swallowing, wash with running water immediately and the get medical care.
  • KEEP AWAY FROM CHILDREN AND ANIMALS.

STRONG HYGIENIC ACTION - PURIFIED SURFACE INTERIOR DETAILING CLEANER

GYEON Q²M InteriorDetailer (2024) is the ideal interior maintenance product, to remove light grime, contaminants and leave a fresh and purify interior feel. It’s safe on leather, plastic, Alcantara, textiles, glass and all types of interior trim. It will leave a matte and not sticky finish.

These days keeping your surroundings clean has a completely new meaning and may decide about the health of you and your loved ones. Q²M InteriorDetailer (2024) has an alcohol-based formula (60%), which removes the majority of organic contaminants from any surface.

Q²M InteriorDetailer (2024) does not replace Q²M VinylCleaner or Q²M LeatherCleaner, but compliments them.

USAGE DIRECTION:

1. Shake bottle well.

2. Hold bottle 8″to 12″away from tire and spray evenly on clean, dry tire.

3. Allow product to dry for at least 5 minutes.

4. Do not wipe. Any drips or runs will disappear leaving a brilliant shine.

Koch-Chemie (KCX) QS Quick & Shine – 1 Litre

Automotive All-round Quick Detailing Exterior Paintwork Finish Spray

 

pH Level: N/a

 

The all-round quick detailer for all smooth and painted surfaces (vehicle paintwork, painted wood, glass, plastic parts, consoles, painted furniture and musical instruments, stainless steel surfaces, etc.). Cleans, maintains and preserves in a single step. The surfaces receive a colour deepening and a streak-free, brilliant gloss. Finger marks and light dirt are removed quickly and easily. The treated parts are conserved and repel water and dirt and are protected from becoming dirty again quickly (lotus effect). Quick & Shine is quickly removed and is therefore easy to use. Previously applied veneers or waxes are preserved. Particularly suited for quick finishing of exhibited goods in showrooms or at fairs, as well as for quick valeting of vehicles.

With Daimler Approval.

Areas of Use

Vehicle paintwork, painted wood, glass, plastic parts, consoles, painted furniture and musical instruments, stainless steel surfaces, etc.

Recommended Dilution Ratio

Use undiluted.

Recommended Use

Spray evenly on the surfaces to be treated and polish off with a polish and sealing towel.

 

Warnings

Check suitability and compatability before use.

Do not use on hot surfaces.

 

Disclaimer: Packaging designs and liquid colour tones may differ slightly from what is displayed in photos, as images are provided for reference only. Rest assured, every Koch-Chemie (KCX) product offered is original and manufactured to the brand’s strictest quality benchmarks. If you require further details or assistance, our Koch-Chemie Singapore team is ready to help.

标题: GYEON Q2M Prep 500ml - Effective Automotive Car Care Surface Prep Strong Degreaser Cleaner
详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "GYEON Q²M Prep 500ml - BRAND NEW 2024 PACKAGING STRONG AUTOMOTIVE PRE-COATING DEGREASER CLEANER - CAR ENTHUSIAST MUST-HAVE GYEON Q²M Prep (2024) is a necessary product to preparing a vehicle for wax, sealant, or coating application. It allows elimination of any oily residues, thus creating a smooth, antistatic surface. At GYEON we use Q²M Prep (2024) more than any other liquid in our day to day, high-end detailing operation. CAN BE USED AS SURFACE PREP FOR ANY TYPE / BRAND OF COATING! In contrast to other degreasers available on the market, it does not only lift up oily substances/residues of paste or old wax, but is extra capable of solving them, hence their elimination becomes much easier. In many cases vehicle preparation before any detailing activities is not being conducted in perfectly sterile conditions. Owing to the antistatic properties of Q²M Prep (2024), we are able to avoid unwanted scratches or faded spots caused by particles of dust depositing themselves on the surface at the key detailing stage, i.e. right before the application of the coating."}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://sg-live-01.slatic.net/p/92e47109e98fa7a139878597c0682316.png"}, {"type": "text", "text": "PERFECT SURFACE PREPARATION Q²M Prep is a necessary supplement for preparing a vehicle for coating application. It enables elimination of any oily residues, thus creating a smooth, antistatic surface. Q²M Prep has strong cleansing and degreasing properties, making the preparation of the vehicle for any detailing activities much easier and more efficient. BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN Not only does it lift polishing oils, but dissolves them as well. Q²M Prep proves to be the perfect last step pre-coating preparation product. Work in sections using the Q²M PolishWipe. TIP: Q²M Prep is a great degreaser on all surfaces, not only paint. Use it on all elements requiring a perfect, streak-free and ready to coat finish. CONSUMPTION: 150ml/car IPA PERCENTAGE: >50% NOTE: Product packaging colour and product colour may vary. The product images shown are for illustration purposes only and may not be an exact representation of the product. All products sold are 100% authentic and meet or exceed the highest quality. If you have a question, please do not hesitate to contact GYEON Singapore."}]

GYEON Q²M Prep 500ml - BRAND NEW 2024 PACKAGING

STRONG AUTOMOTIVE PRE-COATING DEGREASER CLEANER - CAR ENTHUSIAST MUST-HAVE

GYEON Q²M Prep (2024) is a necessary product to preparing a vehicle for wax, sealant, or coating application. It allows elimination of any oily residues, thus creating a smooth, antistatic surface. At GYEON we use Q²M Prep (2024) more than any other liquid in our day to day, high-end detailing operation.

CAN BE USED AS SURFACE PREP FOR ANY TYPE / BRAND OF COATING!

In contrast to other degreasers available on the market, it does not only lift up oily substances/residues of paste or old wax, but is extra capable of solving them, hence their elimination becomes much easier. In many cases vehicle preparation before any detailing activities is not being conducted in perfectly sterile conditions. Owing to the antistatic properties of Q²M Prep (2024), we are able to avoid unwanted scratches or faded spots caused by particles of dust depositing themselves on the surface at the key detailing stage, i.e. right before the application of the coating.

PERFECT SURFACE PREPARATION

Q²M Prep is a necessary supplement for preparing a vehicle for coating application. It enables elimination of any oily residues, thus creating a smooth, antistatic surface. Q²M Prep has strong cleansing and degreasing properties, making the preparation of the vehicle for any detailing activities much easier and more efficient.

BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN

Not only does it lift polishing oils, but dissolves them as well. Q²M Prep proves to be the perfect last step pre-coating preparation product. Work in sections using the Q²M PolishWipe. TIP: Q²M Prep is a great degreaser on all surfaces, not only paint. Use it on all elements requiring a perfect, streak-free and ready to coat finish.

 

CONSUMPTION: 150ml/car

IPA PERCENTAGE: >50%

We designed it especially for luxury and sports cars’ delicate nappa and semi-aniline upholstery. Of course, it is also suitable for any other type of modern leather upholstery. It is the ultimate leather preparation product for use before a coating application, developed along with Gyeon’s high-end Q² LeatherShield EVO & Q² LeatherCoat redefined. It removes light dirt, oily residue and even light discolouration. Unlike most leather cleaners, the formula does not include softening or preserving additives, leaving a surface ready for coating."}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://sg-live-01.slatic.net/p/8e864a924dc05c51f3707422e895d109.png"}, {"type": "text", "text": "GENTLE CLEAN FOR ANY TYPE OF LEATHER Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural is the perfect solution for daily maintenance and pre-coating preparation of leather upholstery. Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural leaves a fully matte finish and is suitable for all modern types of leather. It might also be used on coated leather, not removing the coating and gently cleansing the surface. BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN Always vacuum the upholstery first. Use Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural, along with water, to increase the foam and help distribute the cleaner. Use either the Q²M ScrubPad EVO or Q²M LeatherBrush. Work in sections. TIP: Always remove dirt with a microfibre in a straight motion. Use at least 3 towels: for the initial wipe, a damp one to remove suds and another one to dry the surface. GYEON Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural 500ml - BRAND NEW 2024 PRODUCT

MILD LEATHER CLEANER DEDICATED FOR SEMI-ANILINE AND NAPPA LEATHER

*Product Only - Accessories (ie. Q²M LeatherWipe EVO not included)

**1000ml Capacity Product Displayed in Product Images

The Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural is a safe, ph-neutral cleaner for all types of modern automotive leather. We designed it especially for luxury and sports cars’ delicate nappa and semi-aniline upholstery. Of course, it is also suitable for any other type of modern leather upholstery. It is the ultimate leather preparation product for use before a coating application, developed along with Gyeon’s high-end Q² LeatherShield EVO & Q² LeatherCoat redefined. It removes light dirt, oily residue and even light discolouration. Unlike most leather cleaners, the formula does not include softening or preserving additives, leaving a surface ready for coating.

GENTLE CLEAN FOR ANY TYPE OF LEATHER

Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural is the perfect solution for daily maintenance and pre-coating preparation of leather upholstery. It does not contain any softening additives and does not leave any residue that could potentially interfere with a quality ceramic coating. Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural leaves a fully matte finish and is suitable for all modern types of leather. It might also be used on coated leather, not removing the coating and gently cleansing the surface.

BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN

Always vacuum the upholstery first. Use Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural, along with water, to increase the foam and help distribute the cleaner. Use either the Q²M ScrubPad EVO or Q²M LeatherBrush. Work in sections. TIP: Always remove dirt with a microfibre in a straight motion. Use at least 3 towels: for the initial wipe, a damp one to remove suds and another one to dry the surface.

 

CONSUMPTION: 100ml/car

NOTE: Product packaging colour and product colour may vary. The product images shown are for illustration purposes only and may not be an exact representation of the product. All products sold are 100% authentic and meet or exceed the highest quality. If you have a question, please do not hesitate to contact GYEON Singapore.

GYEON Q² LeatherCoat REDEFINED 500ml - NEW 2024

MODERN, SEMI-ANILINE & NAPPA LEATHER PROTECTANT

*Product Only - Accessories (ie. Q²M LeatherWipe EVO not included)

GYEON Q² LeatherCoat Redefined is very easy to use; it just requires proper cleaning of the leather before ensuring a good bond; then simply apply it to a soft microfiber cloth or applicator and wipe it over in an even layer. With a durability of up to 3 months, this hydrophobic sealant provides protection from liquids, sweat, and dirt and also light ‘dye jeans and clothing that can discolour and stain the transfer’ from leather.

REDEFINED (2024 NEW LINE)

We are introducing our REDEFINED line. At GYEON, we’ve taken our renowned chemical formulas to a whole new level. We’ve reworked and refined them to deliver unmatched performance, exceptional durability, and the utmost ease of use. We’re committed to giving our customers the best user experience possible.

HIGHLY PROTECTIVE & MATTE FINISH

Just one layer of Q² LeatherCoat Redefined ensures a high level of protection as the coating itself is hydrophobic and repels both liquids and dirt. It also provides strong protection against UV rays, allowing you to keep the freshness of colors for a long time, even in hot and sunny conditions. Q² LeatherCoat Redefined protects leather from dirt, sweat, salt and fats. Its hydrophobic properties and strong bonding to the surface help to protect against pollutants that may penetrate the structure of your trim. As most modern interior automotive leather has a factory matt finish, we made sure that Q² LeatherCoat leaves an invisible layer that does not affect the look or feel of the soft leather trim in any way. It simply coats the leather to ensure its good looks remain the same as the day you bought it.

SURFACE: EVERY LEATHER

PH LEVEL: NEUTRAL

BARRIER AGAINST LIQUID: YES

DURABILITY: >3 months

BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN

Q² LeatherCoat Redefined is the number 1 choice for older, worn leather upholstery. Unlike Q² LeatherShield EVO, it doesn’t require a perfect upholstery structure to provide protection and effective dirt repellency. TIP: Use a small amount of product and rub evenly into the surface of the leather with Q²M MF Applicator. Wipe off if necessary.

NOTE: Product packaging colour and product colour may vary. The product images shown are for illustration purposes only and may not be an exact representation of the product. All products sold are 100% authentic and meet or exceed the highest quality. If you have a question, please do not hesitate to contact GYEON Singapore.

  2. Apply it evenly and thoroughly to the desired exterior trim area.
  3. Wipe off any excess with a clean towel.
  4. NOTE: 2-3 applications may be needed for neglected areas.

GYEON Q²M Glass 500ml - BRAND NEW 2024 PACKAGING

STREAK FREE & SAFE AUTOMOTIVE GLASS CLEANER

GYEON Q²M Glass (2024) is the ultimate formula for fast, effortless and effective cleaning of all automotive glass surfaces. Removes oily residue and instantly leaves a smudge free finish. Easy to use and safe for all interior materials like leather, vinyl or alcantara.

SAFE AND EFFECTIVE

Q²M Glass (2024) is safe and effective. Removes dirt, oily residue and even light contamination while not affecting previously applied rain repellents. A gentle aroma boosts the superb qualities of the product.

HOW TO USE: Spray Q²M Glass (2024) on a short hair microfibre towel rather than directly on glass. It may be used on plexi or polycarbonate elements as well as on LCD screens or monitors.

CONSUMPTION:40ml/car

详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "GYEON Q²M Bathe 1000ml - BRAND NEW 2024 PACKAGING SLICK, FOAMY AND SAFE CAR SHAMPOO - FREQUENT USE AND ECONOMICAL Gentle and Highly Effective Wash Solution GYEON Q²M Bathe is a pH-neutral car washing shampoo. Due to its gentle character, it ensures a safe washing for every automotive surface, irrespective of the type of coating used to protect the vehicle. Also, a neutral pH is equivalent of safety of nickel-plated, chromium-plated or polished elements in finishing of a car."}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://sg-live-01.slatic.net/p/a7adabc2bbbb286a4b674fc213dc1ef1.png"}, {"type": "text", "text": "90% of paint defects occur as a consequence of improper washing. A two-bucket method, a soft glove or an efficient pressure washer can guarantee only a part of success. One of its most crucial constituents remains a slippery shampoo, which boosts smooth gliding of the glove over the surface of the paint. The better slippery features, the more we are able to minimize the risk of developing new defects on the paint of our vehicle. Due to the neutral pH of Q²M Bathe, even old, strongly-adhered surface dirt should be removed easily. Like other items in our range of products, Q2M Bathe is superbly efficient, for it has a highly concentrated formula. Thick gel is naturally water-soluble, exerts a very pleasant smell, reminiscent of Q²M Cure, as well as giving longer, lasting foam."}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://sg-live-01.slatic.net/p/212321d260b6bf9ec2330dcc68535134.png"}, {"type": "text", "text": "CONSUMPTION:15-20ml/car CONCENTRATION:1/500 pH LEVEL: 6 Our very traditional, ph neutral shampoo is the perfect choice for daily maintenance of every vehicle. High foam and a gentle cleaning action allow to also use it on cars covered with traditional, natural wax. TIP: Dilute Q²M Bathe in warm water to increase its power and allow quicker removal of light contamination. NOTE: Product packaging colour and product colour may vary. GYEON Q²M Bathe 1000ml - BRAND NEW 2024 PACKAGING

SLICK, FOAMY AND SAFE CAR SHAMPOO - FREQUENT USE AND ECONOMICAL

Gentle and Highly Effective Wash Solution

GYEON Q²M Bathe is a pH-neutral car washing shampoo. Due to its gentle character, it ensures a safe washing for every automotive surface, irrespective of the type of coating used to protect the vehicle. Also, a neutral pH is equivalent of safety of nickel-plated, chromium-plated or polished elements in finishing of a car.

90% of paint defects occur as a consequence of improper washing. A two-bucket method, a soft glove or an efficient pressure washer can guarantee only a part of success. One of its most crucial constituents remains a slippery shampoo, which boosts smooth gliding of the glove over the surface of the paint. The better slippery features, the more we are able to minimize the risk of developing new defects on the paint of our vehicle.

Due to the neutral pH of Q²M Bathe, even old, strongly-adhered surface dirt should be removed easily. Like other items in our range of products, Q2M Bathe is superbly efficient, for it has a highly concentrated formula. Thick gel is naturally water-soluble, exerts a very pleasant smell, reminiscent of Q²M Cure, as well as giving longer, lasting foam.

  • CONSUMPTION:15-20ml/car
  • CONCENTRATION:1/500
  • pH LEVEL: 6

Our very traditional, ph neutral shampoo is the perfect choice for daily maintenance of every vehicle. High foam and a gentle cleaning action allow to also use it on cars covered with traditional, natural wax. TIP: Dilute Q²M Bathe in warm water to increase its power and allow quicker removal of light contamination.

GYEON Q²M WetCoat 1000ml - BRAND NEW 2024 PACKAGING

INSTANT ALL SURFACE HYDROPHOBIC SELF-CLEANING BOOSTER SPRAY SEALANT

GYEON Q²M WetCoat (2024) is an instant, brilliantly easy to use hydrophobicity booster. It’s ready to use formula, giving outstanding results in a simple and quick spray on/rinse off process. Despite its ease of use, Q²M WetCoat (2024) provides great durability and chemical resistance.

DURABILITY:   ★★★★☆

GLOSS:    ★★★★☆

BEADING:     ★★★★★

HARDNESS: ★☆☆☆☆

SELF-CLEANING:     ★★★★★

INSTANT SELF-CLEANING ABILITIES

It is a revolutionary spray sealant that offers instant durable protection in minutes – simply spray-on and rinse-off. The real advantage is the huge hydrophobic and self-cleaning effect that is delivered immediately, together with an intense gloss and shine to painted surfaces.

  • CONSUMPTION: 80ml/car
  • HARDNESS: >90'
  • CONTACT ANGLE: pH 2-11
  • SIO2 PERCENTAGE: <5%
  • DURABILITY: up to 12 weeks

INSTANT SELF-CLEANING ABILITIES

Q²M WetCoat (2024) is a revolutionary spray sealant that offers instant durable protection in minutes – simply spray-on and rinse-off. The real advantage is the huge hydrophobic and self-cleaning effect that is delivered immediately, together with an intense gloss and shine to painted surfaces.

POSSIBLE USE ON ALL SURFACES

A major benefit of Q²M WetCoat (2024) is its versatile character, allowing usage on almost every exterior surface of your vehicle. It will add great self-cleaning properties to not only the paintwork but also to plastic or metal trims, rims or windows.

BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN

Use Q²M WetCoat (2024) only on a wet surface and cool panel. Never use the product in direct sunlight. If you’re about to use the product in a warm or hot climate, work in sections. TIP: Rinse Q²M WetCoat (2024) immediately. Don’t wait for the product to dwell or react - the reaction happens while you rinse it. Do not spread it with mitts or towels, this is not necessary.

ADVICE ON APPLICATION AND PRECAUTIONS

Before you apply the product, make sure the vehicle is clean and wet and that you can remove the coating with a pressure washer. Keep out of reach of children. Seek medical attention if swallowed.

NOTE: Product packaging colour and product colour may vary. The product images shown are for illustration purposes only and may not be an exact representation of the product. All products sold are 100% authentic and meet or exceed the highest quality. If you have a question, please do not hesitate to contact GYEON Singapore.

标题: Koch-Chemie Gentle Snow Foam 1 Litre - pH Neutral High Foaming Car Care Cleaning Shampoo Conc. pH7.5
详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "Koch-Chemie (KCX) GSF Gentle Snow Foam – 1 Litre High Foaming Pre Car Wash pH Neutral Cleaning Foam pH Level: 7.5 The high foaming, pH neutral cleaning foam with a unique cherry fragrance can be used as a Snow Foam for pre-washing when applied using a foam gun or foam sprayer, and as a shampoo for manual car washing. Gentle Snow Foam develops an even, well moistened foam blanket that sticks to the entire surface, thereby allowing a long application time. Due to its pH neutral formula, it does not corrode waxed or sealed surfaces. The Gentle Snow Foam can be enriched with the Green Star to create an active foam in order to quickly remove stubborn dirt and insects."}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://sg-live-01.slatic.net/p/4f48b4acbb67c11d35b65aff59e17649.png"}, {"type": "text", "text": "Areas of Use Cars, motorcycles, camping vehicles, etc. Recommended Dilution Ratio Snow foam: 20ml to 1lit water Handwash: 50ml to 10lit water Active Foam: Pour 10-30ml Green Star into the pre-mixed Snow Foam solution Snow Foam: Pour approx. 20 ml Snow Foam into 1 l water and lather the vehicle using a foam sprayer. If necessary, clean with washing mitts or similar and rinse with water. Handwash: Pour 50 ml into 10 litres water, clean the vehicle with washing mitts and rinse with water. Also perfectly suitable for application using a foam gun. Active foam: Pour 10-30 ml Green Star into the pre-mixed Snow Foam solution. Warnings Do not let dry. Check for suitability and compatibility before use. Disclaimer: Packaging designs and liquid colour tones may differ slightly from what is displayed in photos, as images are provided for reference only. Rest assured, every Koch-Chemie (KCX) product offered is original and manufactured to the brand’s strictest quality benchmarks. If you require further details or assistance, our Koch-Chemie Singapore team is ready to help."}]

Koch-Chemie (KCX) GSF Gentle Snow Foam – 1 Litre

High Foaming Pre Car Wash pH Neutral Cleaning Foam

 

pH Level: 7.5

 

The high foaming, pH neutral cleaning foam with a unique cherry fragrance can be used as a Snow Foam for pre-washing when applied using a foam gun or foam sprayer, and as a shampoo for manual car washing. Gentle Snow Foam develops an even, well moistened foam blanket that sticks to the entire surface, thereby allowing a long application time. Due to its pH neutral formula, it does not corrode waxed or sealed surfaces. The Gentle Snow Foam can be enriched with the Green Star to create an active foam in order to quickly remove stubborn dirt and insects.

 

Areas of Use

Cars, motorcycles, camping vehicles, etc.

 

Recommended Dilution Ratio

Snow foam: 20ml to 1lit water

Handwash: 50ml to 10lit water

Active Foam:

Pour 10-30ml Green Star into

the pre-mixed Snow Foam solution

 

Snow Foam: Pour approx. 20 ml Snow Foam into 1 l water and lather the vehicle using a foam sprayer. If necessary, clean with washing mitts or similar and rinse with water. Handwash: Pour 50 ml into 10 litres water, clean the vehicle with washing mitts and rinse with water. Also perfectly suitable for application using a foam gun. Active foam: Pour 10-30 ml Green Star into the pre-mixed Snow Foam solution.

Warnings

Do not let dry.

Check for suitability and compatibility before use.

 

Disclaimer: Packaging designs and liquid colour tones may differ slightly from what is displayed in photos, as images are provided for reference only. Rest assured, every Koch-Chemie (KCX) product offered is original and manufactured to the brand’s strictest quality benchmarks. If you require further details or assistance, our Koch-Chemie Singapore team is ready to help.

GYEON Q²M Glass+ 500ml - BRAND NEW 2024 PACKAGING

HYDROPHOBIC & SLICK ALL GLASS SURFACE CLEANER

GYEON Q²M Glass+ (2024) combines great cleaning power with added repellency properties for maximum clarity and clear vision in all conditions.

EASY & EFFICIENT

Based on the well know Q²M Glass formula, Q²M Glass+ doesn’t disappoint when it comes to ease of use. It will effortlessly remove any dirt & grime while leaving a slick and anti-static glass surface on both interior and exterior glass.

SELF CLEANING & REPELENCY

Using Q²M Glass+ during your wash routine will add noticeable slickness to your glass, enhancing your vision in wet conditions even at low speed. It can be used over any existing rain repellent on the car and will act as a great hydrophobic booster.

BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN

Spray Q²M Glass+ on a short hair microfibre towel rather than directly on the glass. It may be used on Plexi or polycarbonate elements as well as on LCD screens or monitors.

CONSUMPTION: 40ml/car

All products sold are 100% authentic and meet or exceed the highest quality. If you have a question, please do not hesitate to contact GYEON Singapore.

  • Wipe off with a clean, dry cloth.
  • Keep out of the reach of children.

"suggestion": "More Cars from GYEON", "suggestionUrl": "https://www.lazada.sg/shop-car/gyeon/", "url": "https://www.lazada.sg/gyeon/"}, "desc": "

GYEON Q²M PPF Maintain REDEFINED 500ml - NEW 2024

CERAMIC SiO2 Maintenance Spray for Automotive Paint Protection Films (PPFs) & Vinyl Films

GYEON Q²M PPF Maintain REDEFINED (2024) is a unique SiO2 based spray designed to extend & improve self-cleaning abilities of any PPF on the market. Perfect maintenance for Q² PPF coated films.

REDEFINED (2024 NEW LINE)

We are introducing our REDEFINED line. At GYEON, we’ve taken our renowned chemical formulas to a whole new level. We’ve reworked and refined them to deliver unmatched performance, exceptional durability, and the utmost ease of use. We’re committed to giving our customers the best user experience possible.

SLICK AND REPELLENT FINISH

Q²M PPF Maintain will allow you to maintain incredible slickness of your PPF or Vinyl wrap. Being SiO² based, it will also increase the original hydrophobicity of your film while adding more protection against UV rays & future oxidation.

Use Q²M PPF Maintain for maintenance purpose on any Paint Protection Film, glossy or matte, coated with Q² PPF ceramic coating.

TIP: You may use the product both on wet and dry paint - it will enhance the finish, prolong the durability of the coating and help with drying and removing streaks. Q²M PPF Maintain can be used on vinyl wrap as well.

SUITABLE FOR MATTE PPF: YES

PH TOLERANCE: 4-9

SIO2 PERCENTAGE: >5%

CONTACT ANGLE: >80'

CONSUMPTION: 30ml/ car

DURABILITY: >6 weeks

NOTE: Product packaging colour and product colour may vary. The product images shown are for illustration purposes only and may not be an exact representation of the product. All products sold are 100% authentic and meet or exceed the highest quality. If you have a question, please do not hesitate to contact GYEON Singapore.

GYEON Q²M Cure Matte REDEFINED 500ml - NEW FORMULA AND PACKAGING 2024

MATTE PAINTWORK CERAMIC SiO2 BASED SPRAY SEALANT

GYEON Q²M Cure Matte REDEFINED is a unique, silica-based spray sealant designed for matte finished paints and films. It is both a stand-alone product, providing durable protection and self-cleaning abilities and a spray detailer for ceramic coatings. It increases the depth and intensity of colour without adding any gloss to the finish. Through regular maintenance you may gain an extension of the excellent hydrophobic effect of up to 90% of the durability of the base coating, preventing it from water spots at the same time.

Use Q²M Cure Matte for maintenance purpose on ceramic coated, matte or satin finished surfaces, including colour changing wraps and stealth PPF.

REDEFINED (2024 NEW LINE)

We are introducing our REDEFINED line. At GYEON, we’ve taken our renowned chemical formulas to a whole new level. We’ve reworked and refined them to deliver unmatched performance, exceptional durability, and the utmost ease of use. We’re committed to giving our customers the best user experience possible.

BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN

Use Q²M Cure Matte Redefined for maintenance purposes on ceramic coated, matte or satin-finished surfaces, including colour-changing wraps and stealth PPF. TIP: You may use the product both on wet and dry paint - it will enhance the finish, prolong the durability of the coating and help with drying and removing streaks.

 

CONSUMPTION: 30ml/car

PH TOLERANCE: 4-9

DURABILITY: >6 weeks

GYEON Q²M Preserve - NEW 2024

TRIM PROTECTANT

*Product Only - Accessories (ie. Q²M MF Applicator EVO) not included

As with any exterior area on a car, trim pieces are some of the first areas to fade, discolor, and lose their luster if not properly preserved. Constant exposure to the elements will dry trim out and can even cause cracking in extreme cases. The easiest maintenance is kind that’s done before a problem occurs, and GYEON Q²M Preserve will help you with that. Restore your interior AND exterior trim in one easy application!

GYEON Q²M Preserve will do a lot for your trim – including protect it. One thing it will NOT do, however, is create a layer of sticky ultra-shine.

GYEON Q²M Preserve leaves a matte finish behind, most like the look your trim had when it was released from the factory. In fact, GYEON Q²M Preserve can be used a car’s interior, as well as exterior, surfaces to preserve the original look those pieces had.

The real advantage is the huge hydrophobic and self-cleaning effect that is delivered immediately, together with an intense gloss and shine to painted surfaces. POSSIBLE USE ON ALL SURFACES A major benefit of Q²M WetCoat (2024) is its versatile character, allowing usage on almost every exterior surface of your vehicle. It will add great self-cleaning properties to not only the paintwork but also to plastic or metal trims, rims or windows."}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://sg-live-01.slatic.net/p/87ea73628d1106857cea581037018bc8.png"}, {"type": "text", "text": "BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN Use Q²M WetCoat (2024) only on a wet surface and cool panel. GYEON Q²M WetCoat 500ml - BRAND NEW 2024 PACKAGING

INSTANT ALL SURFACE HYDROPHOBIC SELF-CLEANING BOOSTER SPRAY SEALANT

GYEON Q²M WetCoat (2024) is an instant, brilliantly easy to use hydrophobicity booster. It’s ready to use formula, giving outstanding results in a simple and quick spray on/rinse off process. Despite its ease of use, Q²M WetCoat (2024) provides great durability and chemical resistance.

DURABILITY:   ★★★★☆

GLOSS:    ★★★★☆

BEADING:     ★★★★★

HARDNESS: ★☆☆☆☆

SELF-CLEANING:     ★★★★★

INSTANT SELF-CLEANING ABILITIES

It is a revolutionary spray sealant that offers instant durable protection in minutes – simply spray-on and rinse-off. The real advantage is the huge hydrophobic and self-cleaning effect that is delivered immediately, together with an intense gloss and shine to painted surfaces.

  • CONSUMPTION: 80ml/car
  • HARDNESS: >90'
  • CONTACT ANGLE: pH 2-11
  • SIO2 PERCENTAGE: <5%
  • DURABILITY: up to 12 weeks

INSTANT SELF-CLEANING ABILITIES

Q²M WetCoat (2024) is a revolutionary spray sealant that offers instant durable protection in minutes – simply spray-on and rinse-off. The real advantage is the huge hydrophobic and self-cleaning effect that is delivered immediately, together with an intense gloss and shine to painted surfaces.

POSSIBLE USE ON ALL SURFACES

A major benefit of Q²M WetCoat (2024) is its versatile character, allowing usage on almost every exterior surface of your vehicle. It will add great self-cleaning properties to not only the paintwork but also to plastic or metal trims, rims or windows.

BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN

Use Q²M WetCoat (2024) only on a wet surface and cool panel. Never use the product in direct sunlight. If you’re about to use the product in a warm or hot climate, work in sections. TIP: Rinse Q²M WetCoat (2024) immediately. Don’t wait for the product to dwell or react - the reaction happens while you rinse it. Do not spread it with mitts or towels, this is not necessary.

ADVICE ON APPLICATION AND PRECAUTIONS

Before you apply the product, make sure the vehicle is clean and wet and that you can remove the coating with a pressure washer. Keep out of reach of children. Seek medical attention if swallowed.

NOTE: Product packaging colour and product colour may vary. The product images shown are for illustration purposes only and may not be an exact representation of the product. All products sold are 100% authentic and meet or exceed the highest quality. If you have a question, please do not hesitate to contact GYEON Singapore.

标题: GYEON Q2M Bathe+ 1000ml-Innovative SiO2 Ceramic Hydrophobic Automotive Car Care Carwash Shampoo
详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "GYEON Q²M Bathe+ 1000ml - BRAND NEW 2024 PACKAGING ONE STEP WASH & COAT CERAMIC CAR WASH SHAMPOO (BEST-SELLER) GYEON Q²M Bathe+ is the world’s first pH neutral shampoo containing SiO₂. Even a quick wash leaves a strong hydrophobic layer, repelling water, dirt and deferring the need for a next wash. The wash itself is a real joy, while the shampoo is very slick and has a scent characteristic of the whole GYEON range. Q²M Bathe+ is based upon the same slick, pH neutral formula is the regular GYEON Bathe but has been fortified with SiO2 rich polymers. The result of this is a car shampoo that not only cleans well but a temporary hydrophobic coating that enhances surface gloss and strongly repels water dirt & grime lasting several weeks."}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://sg-live-01.slatic.net/p/40b8c326e94141944098b39c39a797e7.png"}, {"type": "text", "text": "pH-neutral shampoo with fortified SiO2-rich polymers & cleansing agents A true wash & seal shampoo which leaves a high gloss shine Hydrophobic properties repel water & promote water beading Water beading properties last up to 6 weeks Highly concentrated formula - dilutes up to 500:1 (water:product) EASY TO USE When it comes to all-in-one products, Q²M Bathe+ can be claimed to be revolutionary! Just a quick wash is good to obtain a marvelous hydrophobic effect and easy maintenance for the next couple of weeks. It is a phenomenal solution for the wintertime when washing gets harder and the boost in self-cleaning abilities improves the comfort of vehicle maintenance. WORLD'S FIRST SiO2 SHAMPOO WITH INSTANT HYDROPHOBICITY Q²M Bathe+ is perfectly safe on all surfaces including paint, rims, glass and plastic and it will add instant protection to bare surfaces or boost the base ceramic coating you already have on these surfaces. It can also be used over existing natural waxes or sealants improving their durability and gloss. The active SIO2 ingredient adds real protection that you can see every time you wash, unlike many so called ‘wash and wax’ shampoos, you are left with added hydrophobicity and self-cleaning ability that keeps your car actively cleaner for longer. BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN There are 3 ways of using Q²M Bathe+. Dilute it and use as a regular shampoo with hydrophobic properties, spray on the car with a foam lance or simply spread it on the wet, clean paintwork with a microfibre wash mitt. "suggestion": "More Cars from GYEON", "suggestionUrl": "https://www.lazada.sg/shop-car/gyeon/", "url": "https://www.lazada.sg/gyeon/"}, "desc": "

GYEON Q²M Bathe+ 1000ml - BRAND NEW 2024 PACKAGING

ONE STEP WASH & COAT CERAMIC CAR WASH SHAMPOO (BEST-SELLER)

GYEON Q²M Bathe+ is the world’s first pH neutral shampoo containing SiO₂. Even a quick wash leaves a strong hydrophobic layer, repelling water, dirt and deferring the need for a next wash. The wash itself is a real joy, while the shampoo is very slick and has a scent characteristic of the whole GYEON range.

Q²M Bathe+ is based upon the same slick, pH neutral formula is the regular GYEON Bathe but has been fortified with SiO2 rich polymers. The result of this is a car shampoo that not only cleans well but a temporary hydrophobic coating that enhances surface gloss and strongly repels water dirt & grime lasting several weeks.

pH-neutral shampoo with fortified SiO2-rich polymers & cleansing agents A true wash & seal shampoo which leaves a high gloss shine Hydrophobic properties repel water & promote water beading Water beading properties last up to 6 weeks Highly concentrated formula - dilutes up to 500:1 (water:product)

EASY TO USE

When it comes to all-in-one products, Q²M Bathe+ can be claimed to be revolutionary! Just a quick wash is good to obtain a marvelous hydrophobic effect and easy maintenance for the next couple of weeks. It is a phenomenal solution for the wintertime when washing gets harder and the boost in self-cleaning abilities improves the comfort of vehicle maintenance.

WORLD'S FIRST SiO2 SHAMPOO WITH INSTANT HYDROPHOBICITY

Q²M Bathe+ is perfectly safe on all surfaces including paint, rims, glass and plastic and it will add instant protection to bare surfaces or boost the base ceramic coating you already have on these surfaces. It can also be used over existing natural waxes or sealants improving their durability and gloss. The active SIO2 ingredient adds real protection that you can see every time you wash, unlike many so called ‘wash and wax’ shampoos, you are left with added hydrophobicity and self-cleaning ability that keeps your car actively cleaner for longer.

BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN

There are 3 ways of using Q²M Bathe+. Dilute it and use as a regular shampoo with hydrophobic properties, spray on the car with a foam lance or simply spread it on the wet, clean paintwork with a microfibre wash mitt. TIP: Always work on cool paint, never in direct sunlight. Work in sections and never let the product dry.

 

Consumption: 15-20ml/car

PH LEVEL: 6

SiO2 percentage: <5%

Durability: up to 8 weeks

NOTE: Product packaging colour and product colour may vary. The product images shown are for illustration purposes only and may not be an exact representation of the product. All products sold are 100% authentic and meet or exceed the highest quality. If you have a question, please do not hesitate to contact GYEON Singapore.
